title: mimulus langsdorffii var. guttatus
intro: Mimulus langsdorffii var. guttatus, also known as the monkey flower, is a species of flowering plant in the family Phrymaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Mimulus langsdorffii var. guttatus include reducing stress and anxiety, promoting wound healing, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, and it is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
